prompt: {"type":"black-and-white manga page","style":"clean shonen/seinen romantic comedy manga, grayscale screentones, inked line art, soft classroom lighting, expressive faces, blushing, sweat drops, speech bubbles, Japanese text, polished printed manga layout","format":"single page with 8 numbered sections arranged in a 2-column grid","setting":{"location":"Japanese high school classroom and hallway","time":"morning before class"},"characters":[{"role":"male lead","appearance":"teenage boy, short messy light hair, school uniform shirt, shy and easily flustered, frequent blush, startled wide eyes"},{"role":"female lead","appearance":"teenage girl, long straight dark hair with glossy highlights, large gentle eyes, school uniform with ribbon, calm and affectionate smile, face intentionally obscured or blurred in a few close panels"},{"role":"classmates","count":8,"appearance":"high school boys and girls in summer uniforms, chatting in background classroom panels"}],"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1","position":"top-left","count":4,"labels":["wide classroom establishing shot with many students at desks","close-up of embarrassed boy saying good morning","mid shot from doorway with girl arriving and a school bag on desk","close-up of hand placing bag on desk with sound effect"]},{"title":"2","position":"top-right","count":5,"labels":["close-up of girl greeting him, face obscured","close-up of shocked blushing boy","girl smiling and saying he should say it now","girl smiling and telling him to answer properly"]},{"title":"3","position":"middle-left","count":4,"labels":["close-up of blushing boy","girl close-up with obscured face saying it was okay","soft sparkly atmospheric panel","narration box implying maybe it was not that bad"]},{"title":"4","position":"middle-right","count":5,"labels":["side view of girl saying he should say it every day","boy reacting nervously","girl teasing that it is a waste","girl smiling and saying she returns it properly","close-up of girl looking directly at him"]},{"title":"5","position":"lower-middle-left","count":4,"labels":["extreme close-up of blushing boy saying if she does not mind","close-up of girl saying then okay","sparkly transition panel","girl asking if they should say it together"]},{"title":"6","position":"lower-middle-right","count":4,"labels":["two-shot in hallway or by windows, boy saying maybe impossible","girl replying that it is fine","girl close-up with finger near lips","girl saying she will do it too"]},{"title":"7","position":"bottom-left","count":3,"labels":["window-side motion panel with sudden movement sound effect","small two-shot of boy and girl standing together, girl face obscured","large energetic close-up of both shouting good morning together"]},{"title":"8","position":"bottom-right","count":5,"labels":["classroom group panel with classmates replying good morning","boy and girl side by side, girl saying see","boy stunned and blushing","soft close-up of relieved boy smiling","ending caption box"]}],"numbered_sections":8},"story":"A shy boy struggles to say good morning to a girl he likes. She gently encourages him, teases him, and suggests they say it together. In the final beat, they greet the whole class out loud and the class responds.","text":{"language":"Japanese","include":["speech bubbles","small narration boxes","section numbers 1 to 8","an ending caption"],"do_not_translate":true},"composition":"authentic manga page design with varied panel sizes, alternating close-ups and medium shots, emotional pacing, heavy emphasis on eye contact, blush reactions, and romantic tension","quality":"high-detail professional manga manuscript, crisp tones, readable bubble placement, print-ready page"}
translatedPrompt: {"type":"黑白漫画页面","style":"干净的少年/青年浪漫喜剧漫画风格，灰度网点，墨线稿，柔和的教室光影，表情生动，脸红，汗珠，对话气泡，日文文本，精致的印刷漫画排版","format":"包含 8 个编号分镜的单页，采用 2 列网格布局","setting":{"location":"日本高中教室及走廊","time":"课前早晨"},"characters":[{"role":"男主角","appearance":"少年，短乱浅色头发，校服衬衫，害羞易慌张，经常脸红，受惊时眼睛睁大"},{"role":"女主角","appearance":"少女，长直深色头发带有光泽感，大而温柔的眼睛，系丝带的校服，平静而深情的微笑，在部分特写分镜中脸部刻意遮挡或模糊处理"},{"role":"同学","count":8,"appearance":"身着夏季校服的高中男女生，在背景教室分镜中聊天"}],"layout":{"sections":[{"title":"1","position":"左上","count":4,"labels":["教室全景，许多学生坐在课桌前","尴尬的男生说早安的特写","从门口拍摄的女生到达及课桌上书包的中景","手放置书包在桌上的特写及拟声词"]},{"title":"2","position":"右上","count":5,"labels":["女生打招呼的特写，脸部遮挡","震惊脸红的男生特写","女生微笑着说他现在应该说出来","女生微笑着让他好好回答"]},{"title":"3","position":"中左","count":4,"labels":["脸红的男生特写","女生脸部遮挡的特写，说没关系","柔和闪亮的氛围分镜","暗示或许没那么糟糕的旁白框"]},{"title":"4","position":"中右","count":5,"labels":["女生侧面，说他应该每天都说","男生紧张的反应","女生调侃说这很浪费","女生微笑着说她会好好回应","女生直视他的特写"]},{"title":"5","position":"下中左","count":4,"labels":["脸红的男生极特写，说如果不介意的话","女生特写，说那好吧","闪亮的过渡分镜","女生问他们是否应该一起说"]},{"title":"6","position":"下中右","count":4,"labels":["走廊或窗边的双人分镜，男生说可能不可能","女生回答说没关系","女生手指靠近嘴唇的特写","女生说她也会这样做"]},{"title":"7","position":"左下","count":3,"labels":["窗边带有突发动作拟声词的动态分镜","男生和女生站在一起的小双人分镜，女生脸部遮挡","两人大声喊出早安的充满活力的特写"]},{"title":"8","position":"右下","count":5,"labels":["教室集体分镜，同学们回应早安","男生和女生并排，女生说你看","男生惊呆且脸红","如释重负的男生微笑的柔和特写","结尾字幕框"]}],"numbered_sections":8},"story":"一个害羞的男生难以对他喜欢的女生说早安。她温柔地鼓励他、调侃他，并建议他们一起说。在最后的情节中，他们大声向全班问好，同学们也做出了回应。","text":{"language":"日语","include":["对话气泡","小型旁白框","1 到 8 的分镜编号","结尾字幕"],"do_not_translate":true},"composition":"地道的漫画页面设计，分镜大小各异，特写与中景交替，情感节奏把控，强调眼神交流、脸红反应和浪漫张力","quality":"高细节专业漫画手稿，网点清晰，气泡位置易读，适合印刷的页面"}

breakdown.creativeCore: 浪漫校园漫画页面：一页黑白日式浪漫喜剧漫画，描绘了一名害羞的男生和一名温柔的女生互道早安的场景，适合用于生成原创漫画叙事页面。
